# dokku_nginx (Resource)

Controls whether the global Dokku nginx server is running (`dokku nginx:start` / `dokku nginx:stop`).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the nginx server should be running. `true` runs `dokku nginx:start`, `false` runs `dokku nginx:stop`.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
